name: Nabors Energy Transition Corp. Class A Common Stock
summary: Nabors Energy Transition Corp. is a special purpose acquisition company (SPAC) formed for the purpose of effecting a merger, capital stock exchange, asset acquisition, stock purchase, reorganization, or similar business combination with one or more businesses in the energy transition or related industries. These SPACs raise capital through an initial public offering (IPO) and then seek to acquire an existing company. It is based in the United States.
